trash.title: Trash
trash.emptyConfirm: Are you sure you want to empty the trash? This action cannot be undone.
trash.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

workspace.deleteConfirm: Delete workspace "{{name}}"? Notes in this workspace will be moved to the default workspace.
workspace.name: Name
workspace.defaultWorkspaceDesc: New notes will be added to this workspace automatically

management.workspaceDesc: Manage workspaces and set the default workspace for new notes
management.tagDesc: Manage tags and filter by workspace

settings.title: Settings
settings.alwaysOnTopDesc: Keep this window above other applications.
settings.closeLastWindowBehaviorDesc: Choose the app behavior when closing the last window
settings.draftTtlDaysDesc: Drafts will be moved to trash after this period
settings.autoLaunchDesc: Automatically launch OncePad when the system starts
settings.fontCnHint: English characters use the English font; Chinese characters automatically fall back to the Chinese font.
settings.fontSplitHint: When enabled, English characters use the English font and Chinese characters use the Chinese font. When disabled, the Chinese font is used for all text.
settings.fontSizeHint: Ctrl+= to increase, Ctrl+- to decrease, Ctrl+0 to reset.
settings.uiScaleHint: Adjust the scaling of the entire interface, affecting all UI elements. Takes effect after releasing the slider.
settings.showLineNumbersDesc: Display line numbers on the left side of the editor for easier code reading
settings.lineNumberModeDesc: Choose how line numbers are calculated
settings.lineNumberLogicalHint: Number by line breaks; lines without Enter count as same line. Suited for code editing.
settings.lineNumberVisualHint: Number by displayed rows; each soft-wrapped row gets a number. Suited for reading long text.
settings.editorLineHeightHint: Adjust line spacing in the editor; larger values mean wider spacing
settings.editorPaddingHint: Adjust the distance between editor content and edges
settings.toggleWindowHint: Works globally. Hiding the window also copies the editor text to clipboard.
settings.localHint: Active only when this window has focus.
settings.shortcutConflict: Shortcut conflicts with {{conflict}}, please choose another
settings.showDebugTabHint: Enable to show the Debug tab in the settings panel, for viewing debug logs
settings.enableSequenceSuggestionHint: After typing a list marker (e.g. 1. / a. / ① / -) at line start and pressing Enter, a semi-transparent preview appears on the next line. Keep typing to accept, Backspace/Esc to cancel.
settings.seqAcceptModeHint: Choose key(s) to accept sequence suggestions (multi-select):
settings.seqAcceptOnTypeDesc: (Recommended) Accept automatically when typing any character
settings.seqAcceptOnEnterDesc: Press Enter to accept suggestion (off by default to avoid conflict with list exit behavior)
settings.blurToHideDesc: Automatically hide to tray when the window loses focus
settings.navbarButtonsDesc: Customize which buttons are shown on the titlebar
settings.navbarSettingsLocked: The Settings button is protected and cannot be hidden (to prevent being unable to restore)
settings.showMinimapDesc: Display a document minimap on the right side of the editor for quick navigation
settings.showMinimapWarning: This feature is still under development. Minimap positioning may be inaccurate. Will be improved in future versions.

about.description: A lightweight, instant-access scratchpad — every piece of scattered text finds its place

unsaved.message: The file has been modified but not saved. Save changes?
